title: German Sausage Stew
description: A hearty German-inspired stew made with rich sausage and hearty vegetables. Perfect for a cold winter's night.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes. Remove from pot and set aside.
Add onion to pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add carrot and potato to pot and cook for 5 minutes.
Add beef broth, diced tomatoes, and browned sausage to pot. Stir to combine.
Bring stew to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, until vegetables are tender, about 20 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
